ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word being analyzed */,
  "valence_condition" TEXT /* Valence condition of the word (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set the word belongs to */,
  "arousal_level" REAL /* Level of emotional arousal associated with the word */,
  "dominance_level" REAL /* Level of control or power associated with the word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the word was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the word's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the word set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set's purpose or contents */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the set's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being evaluated */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Quantitative value of the participant's emotional response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was recorded */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant's response */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which this run belongs */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* The run number for tracking multiple executions */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for this run's randomization */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., pending, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the run's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valence_conditions" (
  "valence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valence condition */,
  "valence_name" TEXT /* Name of the valence condition (e.g., +, -, neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this valence condition represents */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the valence condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the valence condition's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_word_sets" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that uses this set */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set being used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_word_sets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_word_sets_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being tracked */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the word is used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the word has been used in experiments */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the word was used in an experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage record's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_usage_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_usage_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the feedback */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the participant */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback record's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being logged */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run associated with this log */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
